title: papaver angustifolium
intro: Papaver angustifolium, also known as the narrow-leaved poppy or California poppy, is a perennial plant native to the western United States and Canada. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which can help to relieve pain, reduce inflammation, and calm muscle spasms. The health benefits of Papaver angustifolium include its ability to aid in sleep, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote a sense of calm and well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
